title: Run isolated page jobs without cross-blocking
note: Apply the isolated job rule: each page or project sub-part runs one independent job lane; stalls, errors, timeouts, file locks, or missing outputs in one lane must not block the other lanes. Use max five total parallel jobs. Each lane must write its own status, score, and recovery note. Continue other lanes even if one lane fails. Report-only and non-destructive. Wait 30-45 minutes before writing devam et.
